title: Creamy Chinese Chickpea Flour Stir-fry
description: A savory, creamy festive Chinese (Cantonese) dish featuring chickpea flour with a low-carb-friendly twist, enhanced with pickled vegetables for added flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup pickled vegetables, drained and sliced thin

instructions: Mix chickpea flour with water until no lumps remain. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and onion; cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant. Stir in the chickpea mixture, ginger, and pickled vegetables.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low, stir occasionally, and let it thicken slightly for about 5 minutes.
Season with salt to taste. Serve hot over cooked rice or noodles.
